get_password: SELECT password from users WHERE user_id = %s
get_user: SELECT u.group_uuid, u.user_uuid, u.user_id, u.user_name, u.email, us.storage_uuid, s.storage_name, s.storage_type FROM users u JOIN user_storages us ON u.user_uuid = us.user_uuid JOIN storages s ON s.storage_uuid = us.storage_uuid WHERE u.user_id = %s AND us.is_default = 1
get_user_uuid_by_user_id: SELECT user_uuid FROM users WHERE user_id = %s

storages.get_node_name: SELECT name FROM nodes WHERE node_uuid = %s
storages.insert_node: INSERT INTO nodes (storage_uuid, node_uuid, name, type, parent_uuid, creator_uuid) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
storages.insert_file: INSERT INTO files (node_uuid, file_hash, file_size, mime_type, creator_uuid) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
storages.update_file_on_upload: UPDATE files SET file_hash = %s, file_size = %s, mime_type = %s, modifier_uuid = %s, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE node_uuid = %s
storages.update_file_content: UPDATE files SET file_size = %s, file_hash = %s, modifier_uuid = %s, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE node_uuid = %s
storages.update_node_modified: UPDATE nodes SET modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE node_uuid = %s
storages.update_node_name: UPDATE nodes SET name = %s, modifier_uuid = %s, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE node_uuid = %s
storages.get_storage_path: SELECT storage_path FROM storages WHERE storage_uuid = %s
storages.get_node_by_uuid: SELECT node_uuid, name, type, parent_uuid, storage_uuid FROM nodes WHERE node_uuid = %s
storages.get_existing_file_at_root: SELECT n.node_uuid, f.file_size FROM nodes n LEFT JOIN files f ON f.node_uuid = n.node_uuid WHERE n.parent_uuid IS NULL AND n.name = %s AND n.storage_uuid = %s AND n.type = 'file'
storages.get_existing_file_in_folder: SELECT n.node_uuid, f.file_size FROM nodes n LEFT JOIN files f ON f.node_uuid = n.node_uuid WHERE n.parent_uuid = %s AND n.name = %s AND n.type = 'file'
storages.get_duplicate_in_folder: SELECT node_uuid FROM nodes WHERE parent_uuid = %s AND name = %s AND node_uuid != %s
storages.get_duplicate_at_root: SELECT node_uuid FROM nodes WHERE parent_uuid IS NULL AND name = %s AND node_uuid != %s
storages.get_child_folder: SELECT node_uuid FROM nodes WHERE parent_uuid = %s AND name = %s AND type = 'folder'
storages.get_parent_uuid: SELECT parent_uuid FROM nodes WHERE node_uuid = %s
storages.get_file_size: SELECT file_size FROM files WHERE node_uuid = %s
storages.get_folder_files: SELECT n.node_uuid, n.name, f.file_size, f.mime_type FROM nodes n JOIN files f ON n.node_uuid = f.node_uuid WHERE n.parent_uuid = %s AND n.type = 'file' ORDER BY n.name
storages.get_folder_subfolders: SELECT node_uuid, name FROM nodes WHERE parent_uuid = %s AND type = 'folder' ORDER BY name
storages.get_file_node_with_mime: SELECT n.node_uuid, n.name, f.mime_type FROM nodes n JOIN files f ON n.node_uuid = f.node_uuid WHERE n.node_uuid = %s AND n.type = 'file'

share_link.create: INSERT INTO shared_links (token, node_uuid, node_type, password_hash, created_by) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
share_link.get_by_token: SELECT sl.*, n.name, n.storage_uuid, f.mime_type FROM shared_links sl JOIN nodes n ON sl.node_uuid = n.node_uuid LEFT JOIN files f ON n.node_uuid = f.node_uuid WHERE sl.token = %s
share_link.get_by_user: SELECT sl.*, n.name FROM shared_links sl JOIN nodes n ON sl.node_uuid = n.node_uuid WHERE sl.created_by = %s ORDER BY sl.created_at DESC
share_link.delete: DELETE FROM shared_links WHERE token = %s AND created_by = %s
share_link.exists: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shared_links WHERE node_uuid = %s AND created_by = %s
